## Description
<!-- Briefly describe what this PR does -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant option with an X -->
- [ ] `feat`: New feature (MINOR version bump)
- [ ] `fix`: Bug fix (PATCH version bump)
- [ ] `refactor`: Code refactoring (PATCH version bump)
- [ ] `docs`: Documentation only
- [ ] `test`: Tests only
- [ ] `chore`: Build/CI changes

> ⚠️ **Note:** Only `feat`, `fix`, and `refactor` commits trigger PyPI publishing.
> Use `BREAKING CHANGE` in the body for a MAJOR bump.

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest tests/ --cov=shopee_async_api --cov-fail-under=80`)
- [ ] Coverage is above 80%
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or secrets
- [ ] Commit message follows conventional format: `type(scope): description`
